data.body: Fresh execution-phase epic review BLOCK fe7d9bcd556d26b6e identified a real stale design statement: the delivered sign transaction performs a full fresh reducer snapshot under the write lock, while the plan said it avoided reduction under lock. Updated the durable plan to describe the shipped bounded full re-collection. Also applied advisories f4230ab8154bb0ac5 and fdeb6235b655efec5 by documenting current-no-relationships and the prerequisite-consistency 0.60 execution-floor exception. Completion verification remains PASS; rerunning plan review before close.
